strategy: Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+35% each) and avoid Balance (35% resist).
Do not cast blades or Globals; each makes him Hex you (+35% trap on you). Auras are the safe exception.
Do not cast Traps or Shields either; those also draw a +35% Hex on the caster.
Set up with Auras and pet-cast blades (which do not trigger him), then land one hit.
At 4,140 health a single blade-and-hit setup ends him quickly.
cheatNotes: Casting a blade makes him Hex you with a +35% trap; buff with Auras instead.
Globals trigger the Hex but Auras do not, so use Auras to set up.
Pet-cast blades do not trigger the Hex; a safe way to gain a blade.
Casting a Trap (even Feint) or a Shield also earns a +35% Hex; skip them and burst him.
